description: The food.gdt dataset is open in Gretl, containing household survey data for 'food_exp' (weekly food expenditure) and 'income' (weekly income). Perform an inequality analysis by calculating the Gini coefficients for both 'income' and 'food_exp'. Record these labeled values in a text file at /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/inequality_report.txt. Additionally, generate a Lorenz curve graph for the 'income' variable and save it as a PNG image to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/lorenz_income.png.
